OpenAI 今天发布了 ChatGPT 的“工作区智能体”（Workspace Agents）功能，让企业用户可以在 ChatGPT 里直接搭建能跨工具、跨团队自动执行工作流的 AI 智能体。

这个功能的核心思路是：你描述一项工作的逻辑和规则，ChatGPT

细节看着不错
https://t.co/X95RCLpW6p

We're hiring top-tier Forward Deployed Engineers/Strategists at Varick. Apply if you:

- are technical
- want to talk to and build for customers
- enjoy untangling messy operational problems at enterprise companies
- want in on a rocketship early with a killer team

Based in SF

GPT-Image-2 can be used to make full panoramas 🤯

Prompt for a "360 equirectangular image" of a specific place - I asked for Akihibara at night.

Then I had my OpenClaw agent build a viewer in the browser so I could easily upload the image, pan around, and zoom. https://t.co/Uck5UDIeZZ

GPT Image 2 Prompt: No Coffee No Coddee

a cute kawaii cartoon dog holding a steaming coffee mug, same white background with soft light green ground, centered composition, flat 2D vector illustration, soft outlines, pastel colors, adorable mood, text above: "No Coffee No Coddee" https://t.co/2Pd5pQSg8v

这个通过寓言故事学习概念的提示词真的很棒，我做了一点点小调整，方便你使用

--- 提示词 ---

我在学习：【Agent Harness】 这个概念。 https://t.co/fsWf1eGM3p

还可以配合 GPT Image 2 生成漫画，Prompt：
> 帮我把下面的故事画成 【4】 页【中式现代漫画】风格的漫画故事

打开 一次性可以生成多张图片 https://t.co/Y2cKxosNe4

GPT Image 2 Prompt

🎬✨ Experience cinematic magic: a stunning split-screen photo seamlessly merging past and present, capturing dynamic interactions across time! ⏳

--- Prompt ---

A horizontal split-screen cinematic shot of {Scene}, seamlessly blending two different eras: https://t.co/FmO79doTWN
